---
title: Recipes
listing:
    id: recipes-listing   
    contents:
        - /*.qmd
        - /*/*.qmd
    fields:
        - title
        - description
    type: table
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
---

Recipes are pre-made flows that you can run straight from the command line.

Recipes are **topology-first**: wire elements with `>` or `connect()`, then let element readiness gates and ordered `stage_emit` delivery handle schemas, triggers, and downstream emissions. You do not need a separate activation phase for most flows.

Click on a recipe to see more details and configuration options.

```bash
pyllments recipe run <recipe-name> [<args>...]
```

::: {#recipes-listing}
:::
